ab: maylralra na sinsi.
en: The teacher is here.

ab: adri kalalinay lra! kamelamu uwa katengadraw kanu katatengadrawan!
ch: B:不要再玩了！快坐在座位上！
en: Stop playing and quickly sit in your seat.

ab: igelayan! puwari ku lra.
en: Sorry, I’m late!

ab: kamelamu usabak!
en: Come in quickly.

ab: karesasama na wari garem kana saliyusan?
en: What day is it today?

ab: liyusan lima kana saliyusan garem, sasede ta an daman, salrangana ta muka malinaya!
ch: B:今天星期五，明天放假，一起出去玩吧！
en: It’s Friday today, we have a day off tomorrow. Let’s go out and play together!

ab: aiwa i! kayta i kabalawasan.
en: Great! Let’s go to the riverside.

ab: karesasama na wari an daman kana saliyusan?
en: What day will it be tomorrow?

ab: liyusan telu kana saliyusan an daman, an paelipas dra karealriyan an daman i kayta malinaya dra mali!
ch: B:明天星期三，我們明天下午去玩球吧！
en: Tomorrow will be Wednesday. Let’s go play ball tomorrow afternoon!

ab: kakakuda yu an daman dra semaluwan?
en: What will you be doing tomorrow morning?

ab: kasedean dra saliyusan an daman, pararenang mi kan nanalri muka i kiyukay.
ch: B:明天是星期日，我要和媽媽去教會。
en: Tomorrow will be Sunday, I will be going to church with my mom.

ab: kudrama yu?
en: What’s wrong?

ab: delalu ku, auka ku i puwatraiyan.
en: I feel like vomiting. I need to go to the restroom.

ab: malupaw ku.
en: I feel dizzy.

ab: pikakupu temalaulep.
en: Lie down and rest.

ab: sinsi, nana ku tiyalr, auka ku i puwatraiyan.
ch: A:老師，我肚子痛，要去廁所。
en: Teacher, I have a stomachache. I need to go to the restroom.

ab: aiwa, kamelamu muka!
en: Okay, go quickly.

ab: karuwa ku muka semabesaba dra lima?
en: May I go wash my hands?

ab: adalrep ta lra temalaulep temakesi, uwa lra an garemay.
en: It’s almost time for class to end. Wait a little longer.

ab: sinsi, nana ku tranguru, sasede ku an paelipas dra karealriyan.
ch: A:老師，我頭好痛，下午要請假。
en: It’s almost time for class to end. Wait a little longer.

ab: aiwa, an uwaruma yu i taranapaw i dalan!
en: Okay, take care and go home.

ab: sinsi, an masalr dra liyusan sa i sasede ku, auka ku kinauwa dra ising.
ch: A:老師，我下禮拜一要請假，我要去看醫生。
en: Teacher, I need to take a sick leave next Monday. I have to see a doctor.

ab: aiwa, kasalikesiku nu dradrek!
en: Alright, take care of yourself.

ab: ulraya isuwa i Muya?
en: Where is Muya?

ab: nana tu tiyalr, ulraya i puwatraiyan.
en: She has a stomachache. She’s in the restroom.

ab: ulraya isuwa i Kunas?
en: Where is Kunas?

ab: sinsi, nana tu takulaw kan Kunas, semede garem.
en: Teacher, Kunas has a sore throat. She took a sick leave today.

ab: daw adri druwa i Muya?
en: Why didn’t Muya come?

ab: bias tu dradrek.
en: She has a fever.
